items.name: Festive 67 – Shoulder Companion
items.description:
Celebrate the holidays with the Festive 67 – Shoulder Companion 🎄✨
This festive shoulder accessory features a playful “67” design styled with candy-cane details, holiday lights, and cozy Santa hats. Perfect for Christmas outfits, winter roleplay, and festive events. A fun seasonal companion that pairs perfectly with other 67 holiday items!
